description: Scope-to-requirement decomposition (audit finding 4): a scope item is covered only through its decomposition, never because a requirement cites its ID. Kinds: 'framework' (covered when the complete framework verification result passes), 'authorization-surface' (covered when the scope, binding, and profile authorization controls verify), 'requirement-classes' (covered when every named class has registered, passing requirements, every named inventory is extracted and mapped, and completeness is mechanically established or carries an authenticated residual witness).

decompositionComplete.description: true only when the decomposition mechanically covers the whole scope item; false requires an authenticated residual-completeness witness or the item stays BEHAVIOR_COVERAGE_UNPROVEN.
